For Global Buyers

Why the World's Wellness Brands Source Through Ayris Global

India produces more certified botanical ingredients than any other country on earth. Getting to the right producers — with the right certifications, the right documentation, and the right pricing — requires a partner who knows the supply chain from the ground up. That's what Ayris Global exists to do.

Why India

The World's Most Important Botanical Origin

India holds a unique position in the global wellness ingredient economy. With the world's largest certified organic farming area, a 5,000-year tradition of botanical knowledge, and an unmatched diversity of growing climates — from the Himalayan foothills to the Kerala coast — no other origin offers the same breadth, depth, and certification infrastructure.

Indian botanical producers now hold GMP, ISO, FSSAI, NPOP, NOP, Halal, and Kosher certifications at scale — meeting the compliance requirements of every major regulated market. The challenge for global buyers is not whether the ingredient exists. It's finding the right producer, at the right specification, at a price that works.

Ayris Global exists to solve exactly that problem.

5,000+ Years of documented botanical practice
#1 Global producer of certified organic spices
600+ Medicinal plants in commercial cultivation
9 Global markets we actively serve
The Ayris Difference

What We Bring to Every Sourcing Partnership

We work with ingredient buyers at every stage — from initial specification through to shipment and ongoing supply chain management.

01

Origin Intelligence

We know which regions grow which botanicals at what quality levels. We know which producers hold which certifications. We know how seasonal variation affects active content and pricing. When you ask us for a specific ingredient, you get a shortlist of vetted producers — not a directory search.

02

Specification Matching

Whether you need 95% curcuminoids standardised by HPLC, KSM-66 ashwagandha with withanolide certification, or organic moringa at 80 mesh — we match your technical requirements precisely to producer capability. No guesswork. No surprises when the CoA arrives.

03

Certification Navigation

GMP, ISO 22000, FSSAI, Organic (NPOP/NOP), Halal, Kosher, EU Novel Food compliance, FDA facility registration — we match the right certification stack to every market. Your procurement team shouldn't have to navigate Indian regulatory frameworks. We do it for you.

04

Complete Documentation

Every ingredient supplied by Ayris Global comes with a full documentation package: Certificate of Analysis, Material Safety Data Sheet, Phytosanitary Certificate, GMP Certificate, and certification documents relevant to your market. Documentation is never an afterthought.

05

Sample Service

Samples dispatched fast. We understand that your product development timeline doesn't wait for slow supply chains. Sample requests handled with priority — accompanied by full technical data sheets, so your R&D team can evaluate before the sample even arrives.

06

Relationship, Not Transactions

One point of contact. One team who knows your sourcing programme, understands your market's compliance requirements, and can anticipate what you need before you ask. We build long-term sourcing partnerships — not one-time supplier relationships.

Where We Work

Global Markets We Serve

Ayris Global partners with buyers across every major wellness market. Our sourcing and documentation capability is calibrated to the specific regulatory environment, cultural preferences, and certification requirements of each region.

European Union

EU Regulation 1924/2006 compliant ingredient profiles. Novel Food guidance. EFSA documentation support. Organic EU equivalency via NPOP. Preferred certifications: GMP, ISO 22000, Organic, Halal. High demand for turmeric/curcumin, ashwagandha, moringa, and botanical extracts in DACH, Benelux, Nordics, and Southern Europe.

United Kingdom

Post-Brexit UK Food Standards Agency compliance. MHRA-aligned documentation for health claims. Strong functional tea and supplement market — chamomile, tulsi, ashwagandha and adaptogenic blends in high demand from UK health food brands and supermarket own-label formulation teams.

United States

FDA facility registration, DSHEA-compliant documentation, cGMP certifications. NOP organic certification for USDA organic label eligibility. The world's largest supplement market — and one where Indian botanical ingredients, particularly ashwagandha, turmeric, and boswellia, hold dominant market positions.

UAE / GCC

ESMA and Gulf Standards Organisation compliance. Halal certification mandatory for most ingredients — available across our full range. India's trade relationship with the GCC creates favourable duty structures for qualified exporters. Dubai operates as a re-export hub for broader MENA market access.

Japan

MHLW and Food Sanitation Act compliant documentation. Japan's functional food (FOSHU, FFC) and supplement market demands exceptional quality documentation and traceability — areas where Ayris Global's sourcing rigour is directly matched to buyer expectations. Strong demand for cardamom, turmeric, and high-purity botanical extracts.

Korea

MFDS and Korea Food Code compliant documentation. Korea's rapidly growing K-wellness and beauty supplement sector has significant appetite for adaptogens, botanical skin actives, and Ayurvedic-derived ingredients. Growing demand for ashwagandha, amla, and neem-derived ingredients in Korean beauty formulations.

Australia & New Zealand

TGA (Australia) and Medsafe (NZ) compliant documentation. FSANZ import standards. Organic certification via NPOP-NOP equivalency supports organic label claims in both markets. Strong ANZ market for moringa, turmeric, and herbal wellness formulations — and a growing premium positioning for Indian-origin Ayurvedic ingredients.

Southeast Asia

ASEAN member state regulatory compliance across Singapore (HSA), Malaysia (NPRA), Thailand (FDA), Indonesia (BPOM), and Vietnam (DAV). A fast-growing wellness ingredient market with strong cultural affinity for Ayurvedic and traditional botanical ingredients. Halal certification essential across most SEA markets.

Latin America

ANVISA (Brazil), INVIMA (Colombia), COFEPRIS (Mexico) and regional MERCOSUR regulatory alignment. LatAm's functional food and supplement sectors are among the world's fastest-growing. Indian botanicals — particularly moringa, turmeric, and ashwagandha — are gaining strong market traction across Brazil, Mexico, and Colombia.

Our Buyers

Who Sources Through Ayris Global

We work with a broad range of buyers across the global wellness supply chain — from early-stage brands building their first formulation to established manufacturers expanding their Indian sourcing programme.

Supplement Brands

Brands formulating finished supplements for retail, D2C, and subscription channels. We supply the standardised extracts, powders, and actives that go into your capsules, tablets, and powders — with full documentation for your market.

Functional Food & Beverage

Food and drink manufacturers adding botanical actives, functional ingredients, and superfoods to their product lines. We supply food-grade botanical powders, extracts, and natural colours with FSANZ, EFSA, and FDA-aligned documentation.

Herbal Tea & Wellness Beverage

Tea blenders, herbal infusion brands, and functional beverage producers sourcing culinary-grade dried botanicals — tulsi, hibiscus, chamomile, rose petals, moringa, and spice blends. We supply to specification, with consistent colour, aroma, and microbiological standards.

Natural Cosmetic & Beauty

Skincare, haircare, and beauty supplement brands sourcing botanical actives, essential oils, and plant-derived ingredients. We supply cosmetic-grade botanicals with INCI names, IFRA compliance guidance, and allergen declarations for EU, UK, and global cosmetic regulatory frameworks.

Private Label & Contract Manufacturers

Contract manufacturers and private label producers who need a reliable, audit-ready supply of botanical ingredients to serve their own brand clients. We integrate into your supply chain with the consistency and documentation rigour your clients demand.

Ingredient Distributors

Regional ingredient distributors building their Indian botanical portfolio for resale to downstream food, supplement, and cosmetic manufacturers. We supply at distributor volume with the documentation and traceability your customers require.

Sourcing Advantages

Why Indian Botanicals. Why Now.

The global wellness ingredient market is undergoing a structural shift. Buyers who built their supply chains on single-origin European or Chinese botanical sources are diversifying. India has become the preferred alternative — and in many categories, the preferred primary source.

Here's why buyers across every region are increasing their India sourcing:

Certification Infrastructure at Scale

India now has more GMP-certified botanical processing facilities than any other emerging market. Organic, Halal, Kosher, and ISO certifications are available across hundreds of producers — giving buyers access to certified supply at volume.

Ingredient Diversity Unmatched Globally

From Himalayan herbs to Kerala spices to Rajasthan botanicals — India's climatic and biodiversity range means that more than 600 medicinal and wellness plant species are in commercial cultivation. No other single-origin supply chain offers this breadth.

Competitive Pricing on Standardised Extracts

India's scale in botanical processing means that standardised, HPLC-verified extracts can be sourced at significantly better pricing than equivalent European-processed material — without compromising on quality or certification.

Favourable Trade Frameworks

India holds preferential trade agreements and frameworks with multiple major markets — including FTAs with the UAE/GCC (CEPA), ASEAN, and ongoing negotiations with the EU and UK. These create duty advantages for qualified exporters that benefit well-structured supply chains.

Consumer Demand for Indian Botanicals

Ayurveda, adaptogens, and Indian botanical ingredients are not a trend. They are a sustained, decade-long shift in consumer preference across EU, UK, USA, Japan, Korea, and ANZ markets — with brand equity attached to transparent Indian origin.

Supply Chain Resilience

Post-pandemic procurement strategy across the global wellness industry has prioritised supply chain diversification. India — with its scale, domestic production capacity, and growing export infrastructure — is the natural beneficiary of that shift.

Certifications We Source To

Every market has different certification requirements. We source to match yours.

GMP Good Manufacturing Practice EU · UK · USA · Japan · Korea · ANZ
ISO ISO 22000 / ISO 9001 All markets
FSSAI Food Safety & Standards Authority of India Export compliance
Organic NPOP (India) / NOP (USA) EU · UK · USA · ANZ
Halal Halal Certification UAE/GCC · SEA · UK · EU
Kosher Kosher Certification USA · EU · select markets
The Process

From Enquiry to Delivered Ingredient

A straightforward sourcing process — designed around how ingredient buyers actually work.

1

Submit Your Enquiry

Tell us what you need — ingredient, form, specification, certifications required, quantity, and target market. Use our contact form or reach us directly via email or WhatsApp.

2

We Match & Confirm

Within 48 hours, we confirm availability, matched producer capability, and provide an initial specification sheet and indicative pricing. We'll ask any questions we need to get the match right.

3

Sample Dispatch

Samples dispatched with full technical documentation — CoA, MSDS, and certification documents relevant to your market. Your R&D team can begin evaluation immediately.

4

Order & Shipment

On approval, we manage the full order process — producer coordination, quality inspection, export documentation, and shipment. One point of contact throughout.

Ready to start a sourcing conversation?

Whether you have a precise specification or you're still exploring which ingredients work for your formulation — we're happy to help. Start with an enquiry and we'll take it from there.

Submit a Sourcing Enquiry Explore Ingredient Categories

Intelligence. Connection. Growth.

Bridging India's finest wellness producers with international buyers. Verified ingredients. Transparent sourcing. Trusted relationships.
